name: Bloomberg
philosophy: Financial-news institution using its terminal heritage as design language — black canvas, orange voltage, ticker scroll at every page, hairline-rule rhythm, tabular figures everywhere numbers appear.

design_language.motion_signature: 180ms ease-out hover; signature continuous 60s ticker scroll at top; orange live-indicator pulse; 800ms chart line draw-on at viewport entry.

trademark_signals: Bloomberg Orange (#fb8b1e) — most-recognized accent in financial media
Ticker scrolling at top of every page — terminal-heritage UX preserved
Hairline-rule rhythm — every section, table row, byline separated by 1px lines
Serif headlines against sans body — editorial weight in a data-heavy product
ai_slop_avoided: Don't cool the orange — it stays at full saturation
Don't add mascot characters or flat-cartoon illustrations
Don't remove hairline rules — the grid is the brand
